name: Form: Create

description.en: Create a new lead capture, RSVP, or feedback form. Returns a public link ready to share.
description.de: Erstellt ein neues Lead-, RSVP- oder Feedback-Formular. Gibt einen öffentlichen Link zum Teilen zurück.

bot: Use this to create a new form. After creating, use form-field-add to add each field.

actions.prompt:
Generate the HTTP request body as valid JSON for creating a form. Return ONLY the raw JSON object — no markdown fences, no explanation.

Use this EXACT structure and fill in name, title, and messages from the user's inputs:
{"brand":"form","public":true,"definition":{"name":"<English internal name>","title":{"en":"<English title>","de":"<German title>"},"actions":[{"type":"collect","label":{"en":"Submit","de":"Absenden"},"inputs":[]}],"messages":{"success":{"en":"<English success message>","de":"<German success message>"}}}}

Rules:
- Do not add, remove, or rename any keys
- Keep the inputs array empty (fields are added separately)
- Keep public as true (forms are always publicly accessible)
- Derive name and title from the user's title input
- Write a friendly success message appropriate for the form type
